name: Hidden Network Share Added
notes: This rule triggers when a hidden Network Share has been added.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001528) Network Share Object Added
when the event matches "Share Name" MATCHES '.*\$' AQL filter query
when the event matches Share Name (custom) is not any of [ADMIN$ or C$ or IPC$]
TD_list: APPLY Hidden Network Share Added on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001528) Network Share Object Added
AND when the event matches "Share Name" MATCHES '.*\$' AQL filter query
AND when the event matches Share Name (custom) is not any of [ADMIN$ or C$ or IPC$]
RED_list: Event name: A Hidden Network Share Has Been Added
Event description: A Hidden Network Share Has Been Added
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
